title: Intellia Therapeutics (NTLA) Earnings Dates and Report Analysis on Seeking Alpha
text: Seeking Alpha provides comprehensive earnings information for Intellia Therapeutics. The company's quarterly earnings reports show progression of its clinical programs and financial position. Q3 2023 earnings call highlights discussed Phase 3 clinical progress. Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities were approximately $993 million as of September 30, 2023, compared to $1.3 billion as of December 31, 2022. The company expected a $30 million tech collaboration extension payment from Regeneron in the first half of 2024. Data from over 60 patients showed a favorable safety profile with consistently deep and durable TTR reductions following a single infusion for the lead ATTR program. The company halted activities on NTLA-2003 to refocus efforts on utilizing DNA writing technology for Alpha 1 antitrypsin deficiency.
